Ifit rains in the first four-hour period of the night when the
Moon is in conjunction with the asterism Svati, all the crops would
thrive; if in the second part, sesamum, green gram and black gram
would grow splendidly; if in the third part, summer-crops alone would
thrive and not the autumnal ones. Ifit rains in the first part of the
day, there would be excellent rains in the year; if in the second, the
effect will be the same, but insects and snakes would increase; and

The Moorfs Conjunction with SvSti XXV 263
if in the third part, the rain would be moderate. If there be rain
throughout the day and night, there would be excellent rain in the
year.
[Cf.
